name: Dystopian/Apocalypse RPG
description: "Reality is often disappointing. What is the purpose for us to live if the world around us crumbles in pain and death. We are the experiments that God left behind. A species breathing it's last breath after so much blood and sweat for nothing but Ounces of Oil. Energy and Power. The only species known to man that will not surrender. Come now Brothers and Sisters. For The final stand."
creator: The Lost Renegade
